message: WMI-3 attacker content into authoritative position (attacker-pointer-into-field): content is installed into struct field 'bio_vec.bv_page' — the position the confused consumer later follows as a trusted reference. [mechanism:attacker-pointer-into-field;indicates=WMI-3] [mem:struct=bio_vec;field=bv_page;offset=0] [oracle:assert=bv_page holds trusted, not attacker-determined, content;assume=externally-originated content installed into the field]
